severity_name: SEVERE SLOP WARNING — COORDINATED INFLUENCE ADVISORY
headline: SEVERE SLOP WARNING: INDUSTRIAL-GRADE ASTROTURF FRONT SWEEPS THE X BADLANDS AS MASS-PRODUCED SYNTHETIC OPINION FLOODS EVERY COMMENT SECTION FROM THE SAME UNSEEN SOURCE
advisory: A severe, self-reinforcing slop system has developed as low-cost synthetic content is deployed in bulk to manufacture the appearance of public consensus. The Service advises residents that a comment section is not a weather vane, and that a hundred accounts agreeing in identical cadence is a pressure reading, not a majority. Do not adjust your beliefs to match the perceived crowd; the perceived crowd may be a single script running overnight. Conditions are expected to intensify wherever engagement can be measured.

regional_outlook.conditions: Dense astroturf accumulating along every reply thread, with visibility reduced to zero beneath a uniform layer of enthusiastic agreement. Winds gusting from a single undisclosed origin.
Reposted synthetic consensus pooling in local community groups; residents report the same 'concerned neighbor' comment appearing in four towns at once.
Manufactured opinion silting up into 'what people are saying' summaries. Groundwater now indistinguishable from runoff.
Bulk-generated outreach cresting near flood stage, each message insisting it read your work closely and admired it deeply.
Thin high cloud of coordinated congratulations drifting over unremarkable milestones. Amplification well above seasonal norms.

specimen.status: Abundant and expanding; now considered an invasive keystone species.
specimen.habitat: Reply threads, review sections, and any venue where a number can be made to go up.
specimen.field_marks: Travels in synchronized flocks of near-identical phrasing; every individual claims to be a longtime independent observer 'just saying what everyone's thinking.' Feathers freshly minted, accounts three weeks old.
specimen.call: Finally someone said it — I've been thinking this for YEARS and I'm not alone, thousands of us feel exactly the same way at the exact same minute.
specimen.confusion_species: Easily mistaken for genuine grassroots agreement. Distinguish by the fingerprints: real crowds disagree, misspell, and wander off topic; the Chorus arrives on schedule, stays on message, and never once asks a follow-up question.

spotter_tip: If dozens of accounts phrase their heartfelt personal opinion with suspiciously identical grammar, you are not witnessing consensus — you are witnessing a batch job. Scroll on.
tomorrow: Astroturf lingering into Thursday with scattered sockpuppet showers; a weak front of actual human disagreement may briefly break through by evening.

confirmed_sighting.report: Researchers report that some of the largest online influence and propaganda operations are now relying on cheap, mass-produced AI-generated slop to push content across platforms. The Service notes this represents an industrialization of a system we have long tracked at the hobbyist level.
